paper.title: GroundEval: A Deterministic Replacement for LLM-as-Judge in Stateful Agent Evaluation

official_release.license_status: No top-level LICENSE file was present in the pinned archive; pyproject.toml also declares no project license.
official_release.relationship_to_paper: The author-owned annotated tag calls itself the GroundEval preprint implementation snapshot. Its commit is one day after arXiv v1 submission, and the tag was created before arXiv v2. This supports paper correspondence but does not prove byte identity with the v2 manuscript-time implementation. The acquisition-time main commit recorded by scouting was 0b2dc4940435394f20267c943ec460addb09f412 and was not archived because this task requested the paper-corresponding snapshot.

acquisition_scope: The immutable arXiv v2 PDF was downloaded and converted to layout-preserving full text. The title/byline/version marker, 17-page count, framework and scoring sections, and extraction through the complete references were inspected. The author-owned preprint tag was resolved through the GitHub tag object to its immutable commit; the complete ZIP was downloaded, integrity-tested, inventoried, and spot-checked for domain configurations, event corpora, artifacts, source, tests, README, and packaging metadata. This is source acquisition and extraction, not a deep review, execution of the release, verification of paper aggregates, or validation of deterministic, causal, prevalence, professional, capability, safety, production, or readiness claims.
local_storage_note: The PDF is intentionally ignored local evidence. The compact immutable release ZIP, extracted paper text, paper index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch the ignored PDF from its immutable URL and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
